item.title: WIN THIS by spending just $10 @colombiancoffeebeanshillsboro !! ...

View on Instagram


WIN THIS by spending just $10 @colombiancoffeebeanshillsboro !! Made by our very own @sophyresin the epoxy QUEEN and best boss ever 💞 ✨ You’ve got till December 23rd ✨I’m not kidding I wish I could win this for myself lol come support us - I see no downsides 💞✨

item.title: Attachment issues are real and they start with YOU. The more you...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Attachment issues are real and they start with YOU. The more you know the more you grow and help others do the same ✨Trinh Nguyen, Melanie T. Kungl, Stefanie Hoehl, Lars O. White, Pascal Vrtička. Visualizing the invisible tie: Linking parent–child neural synchrony to parents’ and children’s attachment representations. Developmental Science, 2024; DOI: 10.1111/desc.13504#Parenting #ChildDevelopment

item.title: Why is betrayal so tempting, even when cooperation is better for...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Why is betrayal so tempting, even when cooperation is better for everyone? 🤔 Let’s talk about it.Jakub Svoboda, Krishnendu Chatterjee. Density amplifiers of cooperation for spatial games. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 2024; 121 (50) DOI: 10.1073/pnas.2405605121#Cooperation #Psychology

item.title: It’s crazy cuz not only did I rid myself of the angry thing bu...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It’s crazy cuz not only did I rid myself of the angry thing but the person who made me upset miraculously reached out also lol 🤫 give it a try!!Yuta Kanaya, Nobuyuki Kawai. Anger is eliminated with the disposal of a paper written because of provocation. Scientific Reports, 2024; 14 (1) DOI: 10.1038/s41598-024-57916-z#Anger #Emotion

item.title: Sunlight + Bacteria + Tea = Fuel?! Watch and learn. Seok Hyeong ...
item.description:
View on Instagram

Supramolecular Reconstruction of Self‐Assembling Photosensitizers for Enhanced Photocatalytic Hydrogen Evolution. Angewandte Chemie International Edition, 2024; DOI: 10.1002/anie.202416114#Science #RenewableEnergy

Good news everyone ✨ caffeine to the rescue 🫀it’s been quite the week I know u need it lol come see me at Colombian Coffee Beans on a Saturday Tuesday or Wednesday!! Xujia Lu et al. item.title: The power of touch on ur game 🏀 Take me courtside so I can te...
item.description:
View on Instagram


The power of touch on ur game 🏀 Take me courtside so I can test this theory further plz 😈🔥😂Christiane M. Büttner, Christoph Kenntemich, Kipling D. Williams. The power of human touch: Physical contact improves performance in basketball free throws. Psychology of Sport and Exercise, 2024; 72: 102610 DOI: 10.1016/j.psychsport.2024.102610#Basketball #FreeThrow

item.title: See how I’m forming new habits while breaking bad ones? Very m...
item.description:
View on Instagram


See how I’m forming new habits while breaking bad ones? Very mindful, very goal-oriented. Eike K. Buabang, Kelly R. Donegan, Parnian Rafei, Claire M. Gillan. Leveraging cognitive neuroscience for making and breaking real-world habits. Trends in Cognitive Sciences, 2024; DOI: 10.1016/j.tics.2024.10.006#Neuroscience #Habits

A systematic review and multivariate meta-analysis of the physical and mental health benefits of touch interventions. Nature Human Behaviour, 2024; DOI: 10.1038/s41562-024-01841-8#LoveLanguage #Touch

item.title: Put that phone down when you’re with your partner! I promise i...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Put that phone down when you’re with your partner! I promise it’ll improve their world 💜Siqi Wang, Yasin Rofcanin, Mireia Las Heras, Zeynep Yalabik. The more you connect, the less you connect: An examination of the role of phubbing at home and job crafting in the crossover and spillover effects of work–family spousal support on employee creativity. Journal of Occupational and Organizational Psychology, 2024; DOI: 10.1111/joop.12503#LoveLanguage #QualityTime
